creator: tom.marcoen@gmail.com
text:
1. I'll change the date back to the original date. I was not aware of the policy but igor(1) complained about the date not being today's date so I modified it.

2. The original had a contraction so I kept that, only changed plurar to singular. But I will modify it to "do not" as I believe that to be more correct than "will not" but I am not a native English speaker so I might be incorrect.

3. I do not understand what you mean here. I added a few articles (`the', `a', `an') and tried to get the width of the lines max 72 characters and starting a new line after a period. Are you referring to the output (in the man page)?
